name: Red, White & Blue Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. This salad requires time to prepare as each layer must set before the next is added.
2. Dissolve strawberry gelatin in 2 cups boiling water and pour into a 3-quart glass bowl. Refrigerate until firm.
3. Dissolve unflavored gelatin in ½ cup cold water and set aside.
4. Carefully dissolve sugar in whipping cream over low heat, stirring constantly until it nearly boils. Remove from heat, add the dissolved unflavored gelatin, then cool.
5. Blend in sour cream and vanilla, pour over the first layer, and refrigerate until firm.
6. Dissolve raspberry gelatin in 1 cup boiling water, cool, add blueberries and juice, then pour over the second layer. Refrigerate until firm.
